info.title: eRechnung API
info.description:
REST API for eRechnung Django App - Electronic Invoice Management (ZUGFeRD/Factur-X compliant).

**Single Source of Truth**: This openapi.json is the authoritative API contract. Fields not listed here do not exist in the public API.

get.description: API endpoint for viewing audit logs (read-only).

parameters.name: action
parameters.description:
* `CREATE` - Create
* `READ` - Read
* `UPDATE` - Update
* `DELETE` - Delete
* `LOGIN` - Login
* `LOGOUT` - Logout
* `LOGIN_FAILED` - Login Failed
* `ACCESS_DENIED` - Access Denied
* `EXPORT` - Export
* `IMPORT` - Import
* `GENERATE_PDF` - Generate PDF
* `SEND_EMAIL` - Send Email
* `BACKUP` - Backup
* `RESTORE` - Restore
* `CONFIG_CHANGE` - Configuration Change
* `SECURITY_EVENT` - Security Event

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term.

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description:
* `LOW` - Low
* `MEDIUM` - Medium
* `HIGH` - High
* `CRITICAL` - Critical

post.description: Custom JWT token view that uses our RBAC-enhanced serializer.

Takes a refresh type JSON web token and returns an access type JSON web
token if the refresh token is valid.

Used as reference for BusinessPartner.country (ForeignKey).

get.description:
API endpoint for countries (read-only reference data).

Provides ISO country data including VAT rates, currency, and language.
Used as reference for BusinessPartner.country (ForeignKey).

schema.title: Country Code
schema.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., DE, AT, FR)

get.description:
Return all historically valid VAT rates for a country.

Returns active rates ordered by valid_from descending.
Use the `on_date` query parameter (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter effective
rates for a specific date.

schema.title: Country Code
schema.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code (e.g., DE, AT, FR)

get.description:

Admin-only: create, list, process DSRs.

parameters.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: request_type
parameters.description:
* `access` - Auskunft (Art. 15)
* `erasure` - Löschung (Art. 17)
* `rectification` - Berichtigung (Art. 16)
* `portability` - Datenübertragbarkeit (Art. 20)
* `restriction` - Einschränkung (Art. 18)
* `objection` - Widerspruch (Art. 21)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term.

* `in_progress` - In Bearbeitung
* `completed` - Abgeschlossen
* `rejected` - Abgelehnt
* `escalated` - Eskaliert

get.description:
API endpoint for managing invoice-level allowances and charges (EN16931 BG-20/BG-21).
Each create/update/delete automatically recalculates invoice totals and
invalidates the cached PDF (model-level, via InvoiceAllowanceCharge.save/delete).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: A search term.

post.description: Rechnung per E-Mail versenden. PDF/A-3 wird immer angehängt und enthält die ZUGFeRD/Factur-X XML bereits eingebettet (EN16931-konform). Über attach_xml=true kann die XML zusätzlich als separates Attachment verschickt werden (nur für reine XRechnung-Workflows empfohlen). Erfordert eine konfigurierte SMTP-Verbindung; schlägt fehl, wenn INVOICE_EMAIL_ENABLED=False.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this Invoice.

is_customer.description: Partner can receive invoices from us (outgoing invoices)

is_supplier.description: Partner can send invoices to us (incoming invoices)

leitweg_id.description: Leitweg-ID for government invoices (XRechnung). Required when partner_type is GOVERNMENT.

country.title: Country Code
country.description: Partner's country - determines tax rates and currency

default_reference_prefix.description: Default prefix for customer order references (e.g., 'PO-', 'ORDER-', 'PROJ-')

BusinessPartnerImportRequest.description:
Serializer for bulk importing business partners.
Accepts a list of rows and validates each one.

BusinessPartnerImportRowRequest.description:
Serializer for a single row of business partner import data.
Handles validation and conversion of CSV data to model-compatible format.

InvoiceAllowanceCharge.description: Serializer for invoice allowances and charges (EN16931) — header or line level.

invoice_line.description: Set for line-level allowance/charge (EN16931 SpecifiedLineTradeSettlement). Leave null for header-level (ApplicableHeaderTradeSettlement).

is_line_level.description: True wenn Positionsebene, False wenn Rechnungsebene

calculation_percent.description: Optional: percentage on basis_amount that gives actual_amount

reason_code.description: UNTDID 5189 (Rabatt) or 7161 (Zuschlag) code, e.g. '95' for discount

reason.description: Free-text reason (used if reason_code is empty)

* `contract` - Vertragserfüllung (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. b)
* `legal_obligation` - Rechtliche Verpflichtung (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. c)
* `legitimate_interest` - Berechtigtes Interesse (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. f)
* `consent` - Einwilligung (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. a)
* `public_interest` - Öffentliches Interesse (Art. 6 Abs. 1 lit. e)

is_customer.description: Partner can receive invoices from us (outgoing invoices)

is_supplier.description: Partner can send invoices to us (incoming invoices)

leitweg_id.description: Leitweg-ID for government invoices (XRechnung). Required when partner_type is GOVERNMENT.

country.title: Country Code
country.description: Partner's country - determines tax rates and currency

default_reference_prefix.description: Default prefix for customer order references (e.g., 'PO-', 'ORDER-', 'PROJ-')

logo.description: Company logo for invoices (PNG/JPG, max 60mm × 20mm recommended)

PatchedInvoiceAllowanceChargeRequest.description: Serializer for invoice allowances and charges (EN16931) — header or line level.

invoice_line.description: Set for line-level allowance/charge (EN16931 SpecifiedLineTradeSettlement). Leave null for header-level (ApplicableHeaderTradeSettlement).

calculation_percent.title: Calculation %
calculation_percent.description: Optional: percentage on basis_amount that gives actual_amount

reason_code.description: UNTDID 5189 (Rabatt) or 7161 (Zuschlag) code, e.g. '95' for discount

reason.description: Free-text reason (used if reason_code is empty)

payment_terms.title: Payment Terms (days)
payment_terms.description: Number of days until payment is due (e.g. 30 for 'net 30')

buyer_reference.description: Customer's order or reference number (Ihr Zeichen)

seller_reference.description: Our internal reference or project number (Unser Zeichen)

PatchedProcessingActivityRequest.description: Serializer for the Processing Activities Register.

dimensions.description: L x W x H in cm

PatchedUserSettingsRequest.description: User-editable preferences. Excludes security fields (mfa, lock, etc.).

ProcessingActivityRequest.description: Serializer for the Processing Activities Register.

dimensions.description: L x W x H in cm

ProductImportRowRequest.description:
Serializer for a single row of product import data.
Maps CSV/import field names to model field names.

unit_of_measure.description:
Numerische ID (1=Stück, 2=Stunde, 3=Tag, 4=kg, 5=Liter, 6=Monat)

* `1` - Stück
* `2` - Stunde
* `3` - Tag
* `4` - Kilogramm
* `5` - Liter
* `6` - Monat

dimensions.description: L x W x H in cm
